description_long: This is a military-style combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, armored body and a digital camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle features a fully enclosed rear compartment, likely for transporting personnel or equipment, and a front cab with two visible seats and a robust dashboard. The exterior is covered in a light gray and white digital camouflage pattern, providing concealment in urban or arid environments. The vehicle is equipped with four large, rugged off-road tires with deep treads, suitable for traversing rough terrain. The doors and windows are reinforced, and the vehicle has side mirrors and a sturdy front bumper. No visible weapon mounts or military markings are present on the exterior.
description: A boxy, armored combat tactical vehicle with digital camouflage and rugged off-road tires, designed for personnel or equipment transport.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the fully enclosed cargo compartment with double doors and no visible windows.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the side door, reinforced panels, and two large off-road tires.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the robust bumper, windshield, side mirrors, and the open cab area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door, reinforced panels, and off-road tires.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to be covered in reinforced, flat armor plating with no visible sloping or modular panels; thickness is not clearly discernible but panels look robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in light gray and white, with pixelated shapes covering the entire exterior.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; no visible reinforcement or chains.
